panels.description: A recording rule that captures the availability of controlplane services that the II team owns

panels.description: Brightstaff RPS by handler. The full PlanoAI dashboard is linked at the top of this dashboard (uid: planoai-routing).
panels.title: Brightstaff RPS by handler

panels.description: p95 / p99 of router decision time, by route. Computed from gen_ai_otel_brightstaff_router_decision_duration_seconds_bucket.
panels.title: Router decision p95 / p99

panels.description: Fraction of /routing/* decisions that fell back (selected_model='none' or fallback='true'). Sustained > 10% means the orchestrator is failing to classify intent or has no eligible candidates.
panels.title: Fallback rate by route

panels.description: Total routing decisions per selected_model in the last 15 minutes. The relative bar lengths are the routing mix.
panels.title: Model selection distribution (last 15m)
